name: Aluminum Outdoor Patio Garden Sign "Our Garden" Yellow - Threshold™
description:
Welcome visitors to your garden with this Outdoor Patio Garden Sign "Our Garden" from Threshold™. Made of metal, this patio garden sign features "Our garden" text in white on a yellow backdrop along with an arrow sign for a vibrant display. Designed in a rectangular shape with round edges, you can easily hang this sign on a patio wall or anywhere near your garden using nails, screws or pegs.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
